title: Agent24 Module Manifest
description: JSON Schema for the Agent24 capability-module manifest (today: the TS ModuleManifest in the node daemon; M-E: the cross-process Capability Provider manifest). Forward compatibility: consumers MUST ignore unknown fields; string 'enums' below are open sets unless a closed enum is declared. The `pgl` object is reserved for AgentStore / Digital Public Goods Charter metadata (pgl.yml projection) — schema to be defined in task E5. AUTHORITY NOTE: historical docs (docs/decision.md ADR-016/M1 draft, docs/PLAN.md) use an older draft permission vocabulary (fs:read, net, ai, …); this schema and src/shared/ipc-types.ts are authoritative — vocabulary unification is deferred to M-E (see docs/ADR-016-consume-auraai-packages.md permission mapping table).

type.description: ui/hybrid declare navItem and ship a renderer component; headless registers daemon routes only

items.description: Closed enum matching src/shared/ipc-types.ts Permission (a validator must catch typos); M-E may extend alongside the TS union

permissions.description: Declared capability permissions checked at load/dispatch time

navItem.description: Sidebar entry injected by the shell (required in practice for type=ui|hybrid)

models.description: Model ids this module needs; the gateway ensures they are loaded on register (non-blocking)

container.description: OCI service container — BoxLite starts it and the daemon proxies /api/svc/<id>/* to it

startCmd.description: argv passed to exec (no shell string concatenation — injection safety)

pgl.description: RESERVED (E5): AgentStore / PGL charter metadata — signing status, revenue split (Supplier/Wrapper/Seller), onboarding mode
